name: last30days-skill
description: Research any topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Bluesky, Truth Social, Polymarket, and the web.

settings.name: Google API Key
settings.description: Enables Gemini for planning and reranking. One reasoning provider is required (Google, OpenAI, or xAI).

settings.name: Brave API Key
settings.description: Enables Brave web search (recommended). Falls back to Serper if not set.

settings.name: Serper API Key
settings.description: Web search fallback when Brave is not configured ($0.56/1K queries)

settings.name: ScrapeCreators API Key
settings.description: Enables Reddit, TikTok, and Instagram search. Without this, those three sources are unavailable.

settings.name: OpenAI API Key
settings.description: Alternative reasoning provider. Falls back from Gemini automatically.

settings.name: xAI API Key
settings.description: Enables xAI reasoning and X/Twitter search via Grok

settings.name: Reasoning Provider
settings.description: Which LLM for planning/reranking: auto (default), gemini, openai, or xai

settings.name: Planner Model
settings.description: Override planner model. Must be a Gemini 3.1 preview model when using Gemini.

settings.name: Rerank Model
settings.description: Override reranker model. Must be a Gemini 3.1 preview model when using Gemini.

settings.name: X Search Backend
settings.description: X/Twitter search method: xai (Grok, default) or bird (browser cookie auth)

settings.name: Bluesky Handle
settings.description: Your Bluesky handle (e.g. user.bsky.social). Enables Bluesky search.

settings.name: Bluesky App Password
settings.description: Bluesky app password. Pair with BSKY_HANDLE.

settings.name: X Browser AUTH_TOKEN
settings.description: Twitter/X browser cookie for direct search. Pair with CT0.

settings.name: X Browser CT0
settings.description: Twitter/X browser cookie. Pair with AUTH_TOKEN.
